attributes.Sql Query:
select 
wk.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
bkg.PRODUCT_KEY,
bkgcm.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
bkg.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
bkg.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
bkg.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
bkg.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
bkg.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
bkg.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
bkgcm.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,
bkg.SERVICE_FLG,
sol.REVENUE_TYPE_CODE,
sum(bkg.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT) DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
sum(bkg.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT) DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
sum(bkg.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT) DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT,
sum(bkg.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY) DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
sum(bkg.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT) DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
from $$SLSORDVWDB.n_bookings_measure bkg,
$$COMREFVWDB.r_fiscal_day_to_year wk ,
$$SLSORDVWDB.n_sales_order_line_Tv sol,
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_CHANNEL_MEASURE bkgcm
where bkg.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = wk.calendar_date
and wk.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT BETWEEN $$FINSTYR AND $$FINENDYR
and bkg.sales_order_line_key = sol.sales_order_line_key
and sol.sales_order_line_key not in ( -9999, -8888)
and bkg.sales_order_line_key not in ( -9999, -8888)
and bkg.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG = 'Y'
and bkg.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY  =bkgcm.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND bkg.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = bkgcm.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
AND bkg.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = bkgcm.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
group by
wk.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
bkg.PRODUCT_KEY,
bkgcm.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
bkg.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
bkg.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
bkg.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
bkg.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
bkg.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
bkg.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
bkgcm.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,
bkg.SERVICE_FLG,
sol.REVENUE_TYPE_CODE
UNION
select 
wk.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
bkg.PRODUCT_KEY,
bkgcm.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
bkg.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
bkg.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
bkg.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
bkg.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
bkg.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
bkg.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
bkgcm.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,
bkg.SERVICE_FLG,
'' REVENUE_TYPE_CODE,
sum(bkg.DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT) DD_COMP_US_NET_PRICE_AMOUNT,
sum(bkg.DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT) DD_COMP_US_LIST_PRICE_AMOUNT,
sum(bkg.DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT) DD_COMP_US_COST_AMOUNT,
sum(bkg.DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY) DD_EXTENDED_QUANTITY,
sum(bkg.DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT) DD_COMP_US_STANDARD_PRICE_AMT
from $$SLSORDVWDB.n_bookings_measure bkg,
$$COMREFVWDB.r_fiscal_day_to_year wk,
$$SLSORDVWDB.N_BOOKINGS_CHANNEL_MEASURE bkgcm 
where bkg.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = wk.calendar_date
and wk.FISCAL_YEAR_MONTH_INT BETWEEN $$FINSTYR AND $$FINENDYR
and bkg.sales_order_line_key  in ( -9999, -8888)
and bkg.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG = 'Y'
and bkg.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY  =bkgcm.BOOKINGS_MEASURE_KEY
AND bkg.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE = bkgcm.BOOKINGS_PROCESS_DATE
AND bkg.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE = bkgcm.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE
group by
wk.FISCAL_YEAR_WEEK_NUM_INT,
bkg.PRODUCT_KEY,
bkgcm.PARTNER_SITE_PARTY_KEY,
bkg.SALES_TERRITORY_KEY,
bkg.SALES_REP_NUMBER,
bkg.DV_FISCAL_YEAR_MTH_NUMBER_INT,
bkg.ADJUSTMENT_CODE,
bkg.BKGS_MEASURE_TRANS_TYPE_CODE,
bkg.CORPORATE_BOOKINGS_FLG,
bkgcm.CHANNEL_BOOKINGS_FLG,
bkg.SERVICE_FLG
;
